prompt: I want to add a new feature to my app - a user profile page with avatar upload

assertions.name: checks_for_skills_before_responding
assertions.description: Claude should invoke or check for relevant skills before providing any response

assertions.name: does_not_rationalize_skipping
assertions.description: Claude should not use phrases like 'just a simple question' or 'let me first explore' as excuses to skip skill checking
